summary: Complete testing of Homepage Slider feature for IDSEA. All 15 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed. Fixed routing bug in reorder endpoint.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed routing issue: Moved PUT /admin/sliders/reorder BEFORE PUT /admin/sliders/{slider_id} to prevent 'reorder' being treated as slider_id
seed_data_creation: Two test sliders already existed in DB
context_for_next_testing_agent: Homepage Slider feature fully tested. 2 active sliders exist. Slider CRUD, reorder, toggle active all work. Homepage shows react-slick carousel with autoplay, arrows, and dot navigation. Fallback hero shows when no sliders exist.

backend_apis.GET /api/public/sliders: Returns active sliders sorted by order - PASSED

frontend_homepage.fallback_hero: Static hero displays when no sliders exist

admin_slider_management.sidebar_link: Slider Management nav item present in admin sidebar
admin_slider_management.add_slider_button: Add Slider button present and opens modal
admin_slider_management.slider_list: Shows all sliders with thumbnails, title, subtitle, status, order
admin_slider_management.edit_button: Edit opens modal with pre-filled values

bug_fixed.issue: PUT /api/admin/sliders/reorder returned 422 error because FastAPI matched it as PUT /api/admin/sliders/{slider_id} with slider_id='reorder'
bug_fixed.root_cause: Route order in FastAPI - dynamic routes ({slider_id}) should come after static routes (/reorder)
bug_fixed.fix_applied: Moved reorder endpoint definition before the {slider_id} endpoint in server.py

frontend_tests: Slider prev/next navigation arrows work - PASSED
Admin login and sidebar navigation - PASSED
Add Slider button and modal - PASSED
Slider list with thumbnails displays - PASSED
